_meta.purpose: Resolve SOLVER_TODO.md §3 survival-ratio puzzle: recompute no-learning at IDENTICAL G=14 used by posterior method v3 strict runs.
_meta.regression: weighted OLS of logit(p) on T*

survival_ratios_at_tau_2.comment: REE 1-R^2 (from CHAT_MEMORY.md v3 strict G=14) divided by no-learning 1-R^2 (this file). REE > 1 means learning AMPLIFIES the Jensen gap, not damps it.
survival_ratios_at_tau_2.interpretation: Survival ratio is monotonically increasing in gamma. At gamma=2, REE 1-R^2 is 7x the no-learning baseline. Learning from curved contours generates substantially more revelation deficit than the static Jensen gap alone.
